# Pantella WoW Bridge Requirements
# Auto-generated by pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements.in
# DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY - edit requirements.in and regenerate
# Run on Windows Native (NOT WSL)
#
# To regenerate:
#   pip install pip-tools
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements.in
#
# NOTE: pywin32 and watchdog hashes must be regenerated on Windows
# as pywin32 is a Windows-only binary package.
#
# For CI (Linux), only watchdog is installed (pywin32 is skipped).
# Pin versions here; regenerate hashes after any version bump.

# Windows-specific: pywin32 for EditBox scraping
pywin32>=312

# Combat log tailing
watchdog>=6.0.0
